titleStmt.title: SII 23.598: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 598. (A.R. No. 598 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah district Saumyanātha temple—In the same place, left side

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1172, Saumya, Rishabha, ba. 15, Friday, Rōhiṇi corresponding to A.D. 1249, May 14, Śaka year being current on which day there is stated to have been a solar eclipse. It records a gift of all the tolls including the ‘magaṇmai’ dues leviable at Nirandanūr, for the expenses of the several festivals in the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ, by one Perumāḷ-Piḷḷai the headman of Kaliyūr and a toll officer, to secure the well-being of Madurāntaka Pottappichchōḻa Gaṇḍagōpālar alias Manmasiddharasa. The record is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cakarai yāṇṭu 1000 100 7 10 2
āṉa saumyasamvaasara
ttu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa
ttu pañcadaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyu
m peṟṟa rocaṇināḷ sūryagrahaṇa
ttiṉpotu nāyaṉār maturāntaka
p pottappic coḻak kaṇṭako
pālarāṉa maṉumacittaracar tirume
ṉi kalliyāṇa tirumeṉiyākave
ṇumeṉṟu nāyaṉār cuṅkattu
kkuk kaṭava kaliyūrkiḻavaṉ pe
rumāṭ piḷḷaiyeṉ nirantaṉū
ril makaṇmaikaḷuṭpaṭak ko
ḷḷukiṟa nilavaṭi cuṅkamellām
Ivvūrk kulottuṅka coḻa
viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ cok
kapperumāḷ tirunāṭkaḷ pala
vilum Ūṭṭa nāṭ
kaḷilum muṉṟān tirunāḷilStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.598 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
